search_placeholder: Search roles, firms and candidate signals

talent_pool.label: People database
talent_pool.heading: A quick view of people worth talking to.
talent_pool.copy: Unified decision interface for managing candidates, readouts, and shared communication threads.
talent_pool.empty: The talent pool has no loaded candidates yet.
talent_pool.no_bio: The candidate hasn't filled in their personal story yet.

recruiter.command_desc: The important hiring stuff in one place.
recruiter.candidate_view_title: A quick view of people who applied or might fit.
recruiter.activation_copy: {{account}} is signed in. Add the company you hire for.
recruiter.activation_error: We could not set up the company account.
recruiter.access_title: Sign in to your company account.
recruiter.access_copy: If you are hiring, this is your way in.
recruiter.assessment_center_title: Blueprint creator for the multi-modal handshake engine.
recruiter.competency_matrix_copy: Performance across the current selection pool.
recruiter.no_native_thread: This candidate card is not backed by a native application thread yet. Once the insight comes from a live Jobshaman submission, the shared recruiter lane appears here.
recruiter.no_messages_yet: No messages yet. You can send the first recruiter follow-up directly from Recruiter OS.
recruiter.fallback_action_pipeline_note: Interview actions will appear after scheduling.
recruiter.fallback_action_assessment_note: Tune the strongest curated role lane.
recruiter.calendar_stats: {{interviews}} interviews booked, {{journeys}} submitted journeys in the current operating lane
recruiter.changes_marketplace_cards: Marketplace cards use the updated company name and logo immediately.
recruiter.changes_role_briefing: Role briefing and journey screens pull the latest cover, narrative and reviewer identity.
recruiter.changes_source_of_truth: This keeps Recruiter OS and Candidate OS visually locked to the same source of truth.
recruiter.no_candidate_submissions: There are no new candidate answers here yet.
recruiter.gallery_empty: Add office, production or team photos that candidates should see before the handshake.
recruiter.materials_empty: Upload decks, process docs, videos or briefs that should be visible before or during the handshake.
recruiter.v2_subtitle: Overview of talents, projects, and team resonance in your organization.
recruiter.subtitle_roles: Role briefs, competency evidence, and skill-first selection management.
recruiter.subtitle_candidates: Candidate profiles, recruiter readout, and shared threads in one decision space.
recruiter.subtitle_settings: Brand, media, and contacts as a single source of truth.
recruiter.radar_empty: The team map will start building from completed assessments.
recruiter.resonance_empty: Resonance will be calculated after responses are completed.
recruiter.top_empty: You will see the best-matching talents here.
recruiter.composition_empty: Composition will appear after data is collected.
recruiter.advice_live: New recommendations are calculated from candidate responses, roles, and company signals in real time.
recruiter.advice_empty: Once you create the first role and responses arrive, specific cognitive hiring recommendations will appear here.
recruiter.create_challenge_desc: A quality challenge attracts the right people. Describe the situation, impact, and first assessment task.
recruiter.step1_desc: What is the goal and why it matters
recruiter.impact_desc: Describe the impact you want to achieve.
recruiter.solve_desc: Briefly describe what the candidate should deliver or demonstrate.
recruiter.shaman_advice_text: A great challenge is specific, measurable, and inspiring. Describe the outcome, not just the task.
recruiter.score_desc: This challenge has the potential to attract relevant candidates.
recruiter.improve_score: How to improve score via Mistral →
recruiter.enter_challenge: Enter the challenge for the candidate to solve
recruiter.preview_placeholder: Brief context will appear here: what's happening, why it hurts, and what result would help the company.
recruiter.no_challenges_yet: You have no challenges yet. Once you save one, it will appear here and candidates can open it as a handshake.
recruiter.no_strong_link: No strong link to active challenges yet.

marketplace.pulse_desc: Jobs and company activity in one place.
marketplace.pulse_copy: You will find verified jobs and ads from the web here. Set filters, look around, and pick something that actually fits.
marketplace.filters_subtitle: Refine roles by place, domain and work setup.
marketplace.hero_title: Stop guessing. Start deciding based on signal.
marketplace.hero_copy: Explore teams through real roles, clear signals and stronger fit context before you spend energy on applying.
marketplace.search_expanding_copy: I'm looking for more matches across the database. You can start browsing the first batch and more roles will be added continuously.
marketplace.no_results_title: No roles match the current filters.
marketplace.no_results_copy: Try a wider radius, remove a few filters, or switch back to all role types.
marketplace.load_more_copy: Load the next batch and continue browsing.
marketplace.no_more_roles_copy: Zkus upravit filtry nebo se vrať později pro další nabídky.
marketplace.loading_more_copy: As soon as the next page arrives, the list will expand seamlessly.
marketplace.welcome_subtitle: Find work based on reality, not random keywords.
marketplace.search_placeholder_long: e.g. warehouse worker, product designer, working with dogs
marketplace.filter_title: Find work based on reality, not on a random keyword.
marketplace.filter_desc: Role, field, location, commute, money and benefits are sent to the V2 catalog as one intent.
marketplace.filter_hint: Commute and benefits are candidate preferences, not a hard HR filter.
marketplace.action_unsure: I don't know what I want to do
marketplace.kompas_match_copy: These offers match what you can do and what you might enjoy.
marketplace.tip_featured: The nearest concrete move is {{title}} at {{company}}. Open the detail and verify especially salary, commute and the first handshake step.
marketplace.tip_too_many_benefits: You have selected a lot of benefits. Keep the ones that really change your day, otherwise you're filtering the market into a dead end.
marketplace.tip_out_of_radius: High count of offers are outside your commute. Either raise the radius or stop making a compromise that will annoy you every day.
marketplace.tip_fill_filters: Fill in the target role, location and minimum salary. Without these three items, recommendations guess rather than read your reality.
marketplace.no_local_jobs: No active challenges are currently in the vicinity of {{location}} within a radius of {{radius}} km.
marketplace.no_more_recommendations: I have no other suitable offers in the current radius. Try increasing the commute in the profile or turn on a wider search.
marketplace.tip_next_move: The closest specific move is {{title}} at {{company}}. Open the detail and verify especially salary, commute and the first step of handshake.
marketplace.tip_outside_commute: {{count}} offers are outside your commute. Either raise the radius or stop making a compromise that will annoy you every day.
marketplace.swipe_load_more: Load the next batch and continue in swipe mode.
marketplace.swipe_end_copy: Try adjusting your filters or check back later for more offers.

briefing.title: About the job
briefing.failure_truth: What usually goes wrong in this job
briefing.submission_in_flight: You already applied for this job. You can go back to your answers or check the current status.

prep.title: Job ad detail
prep.failure_truth: What usually goes wrong in this job
prep.why_matters: Why this might still be worth it
prep.desc: Before you spend time on it, this helps you quickly see whether it makes sense.
prep.source_warning_body: An imported offer may have changed conditions. Before responding, open the original server and verify the current text, validity, and contact.

journey.active_cv_prompt: Add an active CV so the strongest evidence carries over to answers and requests.
journey.identity_placeholder: What draws you here and what kind of work wakes you up?
journey.motivation_placeholder: Tell us what makes this leap meaningful.
journey.skill_map_copy: Your expertise in Architecture is a 100% match. The role invites expansion into AI Synthesis.
journey.judgment: Evidence of judgment, not just enthusiasm
journey.response_placeholder: Write your response with enough detail that a real reviewer can judge it.
journey.security_constraints_copy: All packet headers must utilize post-quantum signatures.
journey.target_copy: Throughput must remain stable above 2M TPS.
journey.strong_signal_note: Strong signal. The candidate shows structured thought, clear motivation and enough evidence to justify a live conversation.
journey.summary_intro: According to your answers, you fit
journey.summary_outro: of what is truly important for the role.
journey.jcfpm_dialogue_title: Complete the work profile for the assessment results.
journey.jcfpm_dialogue_copy: JCFPM does not run again if already done. Since we don't see it on your profile yet, add it before the final readout.
journey.jcfpm_what_used: What will be used in the results
journey.jcfpm_handshake_rule_copy: An existing JCFPM is simply used. An incomplete JCFPM is part of the handshake and saves to your profile for future challenges.
journey.why_matters_copy: “We believe the best collaborations happen when we connect as humans first. This session is about finding resonance, not checking boxes.”

insights.title: My profile and overview
insights.subtitle: Everything important in one place.
insights.intro_copy: This is where you keep jobs, applications, commute reality, money after tax, and your work profile together.
insights.capacity_remaining_suffix: more before you hit the current limit of
insights.no_saved_roles: You do not have any saved jobs yet. If something looks good, save it for later.
insights.no_live_submissions: No application is running yet. Once you send one, you will see the status and next step here.
insights.next_step_ready: Everything is ready for the next step.
insights.application_detail_title: Messages, materials, and what happens next.
insights.pick_submission: Pick an application above and you will see what is happening here.
insights.saved_roles_hint: Saved jobs will show up here.
insights.no_cover_letter: There is no extra text saved with this application.
insights.no_messages: No messages yet. You can still send the first one.
insights.attachment_only_message: This message only has an attachment.
insights.withdraw_failed: We could not withdraw the application.
insights.message_failed: We could not send the message.
insights.keep_cv_active: Keep your resume up to date here.
insights.no_cv_documents: No managed CV documents yet. Upload one PDF or DOCX and the new shell will keep it synced as your active candidate CV.

jcfpm.title: JCFPM profile
jcfpm.subtitle: Work preference profile
jcfpm.copy: Complete a short profile to quickly discover which offers truly fit you.
jcfpm.no_questions: V databázi zatím nejsou dostupné žádné JCFPM otázky.
jcfpm.answer_all: Odpověz na všechny výroky a odemkne se archetyp i doporučení rolí.
jcfpm.welcome_copy: 12 groups of questions await you. The first 6 focus on your psychological profile and work style, the next 6 map your real skills and cognitive prerequisites. The result will be saved to your profile and will help us with more accurate recommendations of positions and courses.
jcfpm.report_subtitle: This report compares your internal settings with cognitive prerequisites.
jcfpm.step_prompt: Complete a short JCFPM profile. If you already have it done, it will be used automatically and this step will not be repeated.
jcfpm.step_helper: JCFPM supplements the assessment results with work style, motivation, values, and decision-making style.

hero.title: Skill-first hiring where the candidate shows the work before sending the resume.
hero.copy: Jobshaman helps teams replace CV chaos with a clearer shortlist, a stronger first signal, and faster decisions across recruiter and hiring manager.
hero.helper: To start a paid plan, first sign in to a recruiter account and create your company.

skill_first.title: Skill-first hiring
skill_first.item_1: The candidate shows concrete thinking, not just a list of keywords.
skill_first.item_2: The company publishes a real problem, expectations, and how the response will be evaluated.
skill_first.item_3: The first contact continues as a live dialogue, not an anonymous CV queue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.copy: A shared view of open roles, candidates, and decision steps in one place.

assessment.title: Assessment Center
assessment.copy: The company defines exactly what work and evidence it wants to see so the shortlist is built on a better signal.

dialogue.title: Live dialogue lane
dialogue.copy: The first contact is not a CV drop. Recruiters continue from a concrete candidate response and keep the next step in one thread.

brand.title: Settings / Brand
brand.copy: Your company profile keeps the same narrative, intro, and context across the whole hiring flow.

step_1.title: 1. The company defines the evidence
step_1.copy: In Assessment Center, your team decides what the candidate should actually show: a decision, work sample, reasoning, or response to a situation.

step_2.title: 2. The candidate responds to a concrete prompt
step_2.copy: Instead of a blind apply, you get the first relevant material that a recruiter can respond to immediately.

step_3.title: 3. The team decides from a better signal
step_3.copy: The team compares more than resumes. It sees concrete evidence, dialogue status, and readiness for the next step.

pricing.title: Simple pricing without hidden fees
pricing.copy: Choose a plan by live roles, candidates in process, and team size.
pricing.caption: per month

free.label: Free
free.summary: For the first check whether skill-first hiring fits your team in practice.
free.unlock_copy: One active role without risk or upfront investment.
free.feature_3: Good for a pilot on one role

starter.label: Starter
starter.summary: For a smaller team that wants to move from CV chaos to a clearer shortlist.
starter.unlock_copy: Your first repeatable hiring workflow for key roles.
starter.feature_3: Stronger shortlist without blind phone screens

growth.label: Growth
growth.summary: For companies hiring repeatedly and wanting a clear system instead of improvising role by role.
growth.unlock_copy: Enough capacity for ongoing hiring across multiple roles and hiring managers.
growth.feature_3: Strong capacity for shortlist and follow-up

professional.label: Professional
professional.summary: For bigger hiring organizations that need recruiters, managers, and decision speed aligned.
professional.unlock_copy: Broader hiring operations without losing overview or signal quality.
professional.feature_3: Capacity for a larger active pipeline and more decision makers

bottom.what_you_get_copy: Jobshaman helps companies replace ad hoc hiring with a clearer workflow. Instead of sorting CVs by impression, your team gets a stronger shortlist, a better first candidate signal, and a shared context for recruiter and hiring manager.
bottom.low_risk_item_1: The Free plan is enough to verify whether skill-first hiring gives you a better signal than standard CV screening.
bottom.low_risk_item_2: Starter and Growth give teams enough capacity to introduce a repeatable process without changing the entire hiring setup at once.
bottom.low_risk_item_3: If you hire at higher volume or across multiple hiring managers, Professional helps keep visibility and decision speed.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.recruiter_copy: Sign in to the company account or create a new one.
auth.candidate_copy: Sign in and keep your jobs, answers, and resume in one place.
auth.account_created: Account created. Confirm your email and then sign in.

dashboard.resonance_copy: High alignment with environment that allows you to grow and deliver real value.
dashboard.no_challenges: As soon as marketplace challenges arrive from the database, the one with the highest current match will be displayed here.
dashboard.no_handshakes: As soon as the first matches or submitted handshakes appear, you will see them here in a clear line.
dashboard.mentor_intro: I'm here. Not as a chatbot for nice sentences, but as a career mirror. Start with a question, or tell me straight where your career is stuck, {{name}}.
dashboard.mentor_suggestion_1: What do my data tell me about the next step?
dashboard.mentor_suggestion_2: What kind of job should I stop chasing just for the money?
dashboard.mentor_suggestion_3: What should I do in the next 24 hours?
dashboard.profile_subtitle: Your skills, experience and potential in one place.
dashboard.default_subtitle: “Everyone has potential. Our mission is to uncover it.” — Cybershaman
dashboard.mentor_disclaimer: Answers go through Mistral and follow the manual of shamanic honesty. When data is missing, it should say so out loud.
dashboard.tone_source_desc: Backend loads `manual.md` and adds safety boundaries so that the direct speech doesn't slip into a caricature.
dashboard.private_compass_desc: Your data will only be displayed after logging in.
dashboard.private_compass_detail: Profile, archetype, JHI and recommendations are personal. In logged-out mode, we don't share or display them from the local cache.
dashboard.default_archetype_copy_1: You see connections where others are not looking yet.
dashboard.default_archetype_copy_2: You build systems that make sense.
dashboard.values_fit_label: Value-wise, these topics fit you best right now: {{tags}}.
dashboard.risks_jcfpm_warning: Risks will be refined after completing JCFPM.

applications.no_generic_cv: No generic CV. Just a clear demonstration of your skills.
applications.empty_handshakes_subtitle: No handshake with a company is currently in progress.
applications.empty_saved_subtitle: You can save interesting roles from the marketplace for later using the bookmark icon.
applications.handshake_description: In JobShaman, companies don't evaluate your CV by keywords. Instead, you go through a so-called Handshake – you solve real-world situations, complete your profile and show how you think. Only when there is a clear mutual match, a connection is made.

detail.company_signal_body: The branded JobShaman detail links the role, team, and handshake materials so you can picture a real working day.
detail.fit_signal_body: JHI, salary, taxes, and commute are calculated before starting the handshake, not after a wasted afternoon.
detail.reality_heading: Real work, money, commute and energy in one view.
detail.tax_effective_rate: Effective rate: {{rate}}%. Impact of benefits and commute on JHI finance: {{adjustment}} points.
detail.commute_relocation_warning: This offer looks more like a relocation decision than a regular commute.
detail.commute_no_warning: Commute has no special warnings from available data. Still take it as an estimate based on saved profile.
detail.imported_warning: Imported offers may have changed terms. Before responding, open the original source to verify the current text, validity, and contact.

lifestory.context_prompt: What is your current situation? (e.g. return from parental leave, burnout, desire to change fields?)
lifestory.craft_prompt: What skills did you acquire outside of work? Certificates, self-study, informal leadership?
lifestory.growth_prompt: When did you first feel like you excelled at something? First jobs, schools, what did you enjoy?
lifestory.placeholder: Feel free to write in bullet points...
lifestory.roots_prompt: What did you want to be when you were little? What were your first big hobbies?
lifestory.signals_prompt: Remember moments when you were 'in the zone'. What activity was it? And what took your energy away?
lifestory.vision_prompt: If there were no obstacles, what direction would you like to pursue for the next 5 years?

learning.title: Courses and next steps
learning.subtitle: Choose a specific skill that will help you get closer to a job, not just another item for your CV.
learning.start_python: Start with Python and basic automation.
learning.start_data: Start with data and learn to read reality in numbers.
learning.description: Czechitas has a strong offering for Python, data analysis, testing and AI in data. Here we map them to career paths: what helps you for specific roles, handshake and portfolio.
learning.recommendation_jcfpm: Recommendations can further connect to JCFPM signals.
learning.recommendation_pending: After self-discovery, courses can be sorted by your strengths.
learning.how_to_work_subtitle: Courses should lead to evidence of skill.
learning.step1: Choose a direction based on the job you want, not the course title.
learning.step2: Start with a short course or introduction if you're not sure.
learning.step3: After the course, save the output to your profile and use it in a handshake.
learning.next_version_copy: Later we can add live import of dates, saving selected courses to profile and recommendations based on specific job offers.

data.title: Data and Analytics
data.summary: Intro to data analysis, SQL, Power BI, Python and longer Digital Academy Data.

python.title: Python
python.summary: First programming, working with data structures, API and automation basics.

testing.title: Testing
testing.summary: Test scenarios, end-user perspective and practical entry into QA.

ai_data.title: AI in Data Analysis
ai_data.summary: How to push data analysis further using AI tools and faster interpretation of outputs.

landing.eyebrow: Skill-first hiring for candidates and companies
landing.title: Work that makes sense.
landing.subtitle: No CV spam. No silence after sending. No lost candidates.
landing.pillar1_copy: First you show what you can do. Resume is just the second step.
landing.pillar2_copy: Every application has weight. Less chaos, more answers.
landing.pillar2_meta: Free: 5 active applications. Premium: 25 active applications.
landing.pillar3_copy: The next step is not just a click. The candidate really proves their skills — and the company responds.

company_landing.eyebrow: For companies that hire by doing
company_landing.title: Give candidates a task, not just a form.
company_landing.subtitle: JobShaman helps companies translate a role into real work reality, get the first useful signal from candidates, and manage selection in one clear space.
company_landing.step1_copy: You describe the actual work, criteria and situations that the candidate should think about.
company_landing.step2_copy: Candidate responds to a specific work scenario. Not just a CV, but proof of thinking.
company_landing.step3_copy: Recruiter and hiring manager see status, notes, risks and next steps in one space.
company_landing.outcome1_copy: Quickly separate candidates who just look good on paper from those who understand the work.
company_landing.outcome3_copy: Decisions are based on answers, signals and agreed criteria, not on impressions from the inbox.
company_landing.new_account_hint: Create a new company account via the same button. After logging in, creating a company profile will follow.
company_landing.workflow_title: A simple process the team understands in minutes.
company_landing.outcomes_copy: JobShaman is not an ATS replacement for everything. It's a work layer for the start of selection: roles, candidate's first response, team assessment, and next steps.
company_landing.pricing_title: Start with a small pilot. Pay for repeated use.
company_landing.pricing_copy: Prices are indicative for the V2 pilot. Final rates may adjust based on volume, support, and integrations.
company_landing.plan_free_desc: For the first verification of whether skill-first hiring fits you in practice.
company_landing.plan_starter_desc: For a smaller team that wants to systematically move from CV chaos to a clearer shortlist.
company_landing.plan_growth_desc: For companies that hire repeatedly and want a clear system instead of role-by-role improvisation.
company_landing.plan_pro_desc: For larger hiring organizations that want to align recruiters, team leads, and decision speed.
company_landing.faq_q1_copy: Not primarily. JobShaman handles role definitions, first signals, and team decisions. ATS can remain the system of record.
company_landing.faq_q2_title: Must a candidate upload a CV?
company_landing.faq_q2_copy: No. A CV can help later, but the first interaction is based on a specific response to the role.
company_landing.faq_q3_copy: You set up the company, complete the profile, and can prepare the first role or pilot task.
company_landing.footer_title: Prepare your first role without a big project.
company_landing.footer_copy: A pilot can start with one position and a small team.
company_landing.demo_step1_copy: Candidate solves a real team situation
company_landing.outcome2_copy: Role arises from the reality of the team, not from a template full of empty requirements.

legal.last_updated: These terms are valid from May 1, 2026. The last update occurred in connection with the launch of version V2.

profile.jhi_desc_long: Your Job Human Index shows your potential, adaptability and readiness for new challenges.
profile.onboarding_impact_desc: After onboarding, recommendations are not only guided by the role name, but also by how much space you need for meaning, autonomy and creation.
profile.no_experience_cv_desc: There is no experience yet. By uploading a CV, you will complete them automatically.
profile.onboarding_incomplete: Onboarding still needs a few steps to complete
profile.no_documents: There is no document here yet.
profile.skills_placeholder: Skills will appear after completing CV or profile.

identities.architect_desc: Your energy belongs in building systems that connect people, technology and environment. Routine weakens you, complexity charges you.
identities.human_desc: A strong signal points to roles where human impact, system change and ambiguity intersect.
identities.default_desc: AI reads a direction from your onboarding in which you should create, not just execute.

modes.design: System design · innovation tracks · architecture challenges

signals.earthship_body: You arrived at an Earthship-style solution without knowing the existing concept. This is a strong marker of independent systems imagination.
signals.default_body: AI looks for moments in your story when you arrived at unusual but functional solutions independently.

risk.no_autonomy: Roles without autonomy and long-term meaning

strong_zone.complex_design: Complex system design without existing templates
strong_zone.ambiguity: Creating new structures and navigating ambiguity

tasks.questions_desc: It will help us get to know you better

placeholders.signals: Add a few key signals and JobShaman will refine your career identity and recommended roles.

errors.cv_format: We support only PDF or Word documents.

cookie_banner.title: Privacy Protection
cookie_banner.heading: You are entering a protected space
cookie_banner.description: JobShaman uses cookies to ensure security, analyze traffic and personalize your experience. We respect your privacy and allow you to choose which technologies you enable.

fit.title: Skill-first fit
fit.no_evidence: Fit calculated without strong positive evidence.
